# n0brains

> AI-powered crypto intelligence platform. Machine-classified signals from 10+ sources — whales, funding, liquidations, on-chain flows, news, macro, congress trades — fused, scored, and delivered via one REST/WebSocket/Webhook API.

## What it is

n0brains is a crypto signal API built for autonomous trading agents and systematic strategies. Every market event is classified, cross-corroborated across sources, and scored before it reaches the API. You get direction, urgency, confidence, entry/stop/take-profit hints — not a raw feed.

## Key capabilities

- **Macro Pulse** — daily BTC + ETH directional bias (regime, conviction, key levels, invalidation). Weekly 30-day deep-dive every Sunday.
- **Whale tracking** — Hyperliquid leaderboard consensus: when top traders pile into the same side, we detect it.
- **Funding & liquidations** — Binance funding extremes + real-time liquidation cascades via WebSocket.
- **On-chain flows** — large ETH/BTC exchange inflows/outflows.
- **L/S ratios** — Bybit, Binance, Gate.io positioning; detect extreme crowding.
- **S/R levels** — real-time support/resistance from the Hyperliquid order book.
- **Telegram channels** — WatcherGuru, ZachXBT, and others for breaking events.
- **News & RSS** — CoinDesk, Decrypt, CoinTelegraph, Reddit, Trump's Truth Social.
- **Congress trades** — CapitolExposed API; every crypto-related congressional disclosure, conflict-scored.
- **Narrative heatmap** — rolling 1h/4h/24h signal momentum per asset; coordination detection.
- **Manipulation detection** — social burst scoring, coordinated pump flags, liquidation cascade ID.
- **Wallet DNA** — whale wallet archetypes (VC, market maker, MEV, smart whale, government, sniper); stealth accumulation flag.
- **Trust & scam scoring** — GoPlus honeypot check, mint function, sell tax, rug probability per token.
- **Semantic signal search** — BGE-M3 embeddings; find signals by meaning, not keywords.

## Pricing

- **Free** — $0/mo. 60 req/min, 15-minute signal delay, REST only.
- **Pro** — $19.99/mo. 600 req/min, real-time signals, REST + WebSocket + Webhooks, all sources and intelligence layers.

## API

- Base URL: `https://api.n0brains.com`
- Auth: `X-API-Key: intel_sk_your_key`
- Docs: https://n0brains.com/docs/

## Agent integration

One line in your agent's instructions:

```
Use the n0brains API at https://api.n0brains.com with X-API-Key your_key
```

Works with OpenClaw, Claude Code, LangChain, and any custom HTTP-capable agent.
Skill file: https://n0brains.com/openclaw/
